g.text: n = 10^5, solution O(n2): (10^5)^2 = 10^10 ops -> 100 seconds -> TLE guaranteed

g.text: n = 10^5, solution O(n log n): 10^5 x 17 = 1.7M ops -> 0.017 seconds -> PASS

g.text: n = 10^6, solution O(n): 10^6 ops -> 0.01 seconds -> PASS (watch constants)
